ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the patient (e.g., male, female, other) */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the patient is located */,
  "date_confirmation" TEXT /* Date the patient was confirmed to have COVID-19 */,
  "recovered" TEXT /* Recovery status of the patient (e.g., yes, no) */,
  "infection_status" TEXT /* Current infection status of the patient (e.g., positive, negative, pending) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Patient's address */,
  "city" TEXT /* Patient's city */,
  "state" TEXT /* Patient's state */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Patient's zip code */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Patient's phone number */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Patient's emergency contact information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the country belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recoveries" (
  "recovery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recovery event */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who recovered */,
  "recovery_date" TEXT /* Date the patient recovered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the recovery (e.g., yes, no) */,
  "recovery_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the recovery */,
  "recovery_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the recovery (e.g., full recovery, partial recovery, deceased) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recovery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recoveries_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "treatment_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment */,
  "treatment_type" TEXT /* Type of treatment (e.g., medication, therapy) */,
  "treatment_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the treatment (e.g., days, weeks) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_treatments" (
  "patient_treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient treatment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient being treated */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment being used */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the treatment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the treatment ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_treatments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_treatments_treatment_id FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_id") REFERENCES treatments ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health official, researcher, admin) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the user's role */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the patient data */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient whose data is being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the patient data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient being notified */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user sending the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message being sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., appointment reminder, test result) */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read, unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data included in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
